MINUTES
(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO FAMILY COURT SERVICES FOR MEDIATION AND RETURNED. UNABLE TO REA
CH AN AGREEMENT THE PARTIES MET WITH THE COURT IN CHAMBERS. ON THE RECORD THE ISSUE OF THE MOVE AWAY WAS ARGUED. BECAUSE NEITHER PARENT LIVES IN SAN
SCHOOL YEAR HAS ENDED. FATHER SHALL HAVE ALL THREE DAY WEEKENDS AND THE SPRING BREAK FOR VISITATION INCLUDING THE WEEKEND BEFORE AND AFTER THE BREAK.
CALLS BETWEEN FATHER AND CHILD SHALL OCCUR BETWEEN 7:30 AND 8:00 P.M. ON WEDNESDAY. CHILD SUPPORT WAS ORDERED AT THE RATE OF $297.00 PER MONTH
SHALL BE SUBMITTED WITHIN THIRTY DAYS OR PETITIONER SHALL NOT BE REIMBURSED. RESPONDENT SHALL PAY $100.00 TOWARD THE AIRFARE FOR EACH VISIT. THERE
PONDENT SHALL PAY $150.00 TO THE STAR PROGRAM DIRECTLY AND NO ADDITIONAL FOR CHILD CARE. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES WAS DENIED. RESERVE ISSUE OF
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VERONICA MORI CSR #7006
HALL BE PROVIDED TO FAMILY COURT SERVICES AND TO RESPONDENT. IN JANUARY 1998 RESPONDENT SHALL PAY PETITIONER DIRECTLY ON THE FIRST AND THE FIFTEENTH.

(404)PETITIONER APPEARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. COUNSEL AND PARTIES MET WITH THE COURT IN CHAMBERS. NOT REPORTED. CONTINUE TO MAY 22,
1998, AT 9:00 A.M. FOR ALL DAY HEARING. (KING)
MINUTES
(404)THIS MATTER CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL OVER PETITIONER'S MOTION TO MOVE AWAY FROM THE BAY AREA WITH THE CHILD AND RESPONDENT'S MOTION FOR CUSTODY. PETITIONER APP
EARED WITH COUNSEL. RESPONDENT APPEARED IN PROPRIA PERSONA. AT 9:35 A.M. ONOFRAE MILAN WAS AFFIRMED AND TESTIFIED ON BEHALF OF THE PETITIONER.
AT 10:00 A.M. SCOTTIE JAMES DARBONNE WAS SWORN AND TESTIFIED UNDER EVIDENCE CODE 471. PETITIONER'S EXHIBIT #2, A COPY OF A DOCUMENT ENTITLED:
TO CANYON CHARTER SCHOOL DATED DECEMBER 8, 1997, WAS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION, MOVED, AND ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. PETITIONER'S EXHIBIT #4, A ONE PAGE
HE COURT TOOK A SHORT RECESS. AFTER THE RECESS AND AFTER ANOTHER BRIEF MATTER WAS DISPOSED OF BY THE COURT, PROCEEDINGS CONTINUED AT 11:15 A.M. WITH
A TWO PAGE COPY OF A PSYCO-SOCIAL ASSESSMENT DATED JULY 20, 1990, WAS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION, MOVED, AND THE COURT DENIED THE ENTRY OF THIS
, AND ENTERED INTO EVIDENCE. AT 12:00 PROCEEDINGS ADJOURNED FOR LUNCH. AT 1:40 P.M. PROCEEDINGS RESUMED WITH ALL PRESENT AS HERETOFORE EXCEPT THAT
LF OF THE RESPONDENT. AT 2:44 P.M. SCOTTIE JAMES DARBONNE SWORN/AFFIRMED AND TESTIFIED ON HIS OWN BEHALF. AT 2:53 P.M., PETITIONER/MOTHER AND
PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY VERONICA MORI CSR# 7006
GED FOR PICK-UP AND DROP-OFF TIMES FOR WEEKEND VISITATION BETWEEN MINOR AND FATHER. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. (KING)
